perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live action. Two women sit on a white sofa in a minimalist room. The older woman on the left wears over-ear headphones and a black shirt with large colored patterns. The younger woman on the right wears a black dress with a tiered skirt. They talk and use hand gestures. (2) Chronological photos of an incense factory, family members, and travel scenes appear as overlays in the upper center of the screen while the women remain seated. (3) The younger woman becomes visibly emotional, looking down and occasionally wiping her eyes. (4) Both women finish the video by cheering together, waving their arms, and looking directly into the lens with bright smiles.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Soft, sentimental piano music plays at a low volume. A female voice speaks in Mandarin with a narrative and nostalgic tone. (2) The background music continues steadily as the main female speaker's voice fluctuates in pitch and speed, reflecting emotional storytelling. (3) Occasional pauses in speech allow the melodic piano to become more prominent. (4) The two female voices join together for a loud, high-pitched, and excited shout of 'Happy Mother's Day!' before the audio fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'MOTHER'S DAY' and '二伯心裡的媽媽' (The mother in Er Bo's heart) appear as a title card - warm and celebratory tone. (2) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles throughout the video translate the spoken dialogue regarding maternal sacrifices - emotional tone. (3) Decorative Text: '身為一家的大姐曾覺得媽媽偏心嗎？' (As the eldest sister, did you think mom was biased?) appears as a section header - inquiring tone. (4) Decorative Text: '祝全天下的媽媽 母親節快樂' (Happy Mother's Day to all mothers) appears at the end - celebratory tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Question-based Interview -> Emotional Reflections -> Cheerful Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main women on sofa, approximately 5 others (men and children) visible in photo overlays.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The younger woman has long brown hair and wears a black sleeveless dress. The older woman has short brown hair, wears over-ear headphones, a black shirt with colorful geometric shapes, and a white polka-dot scarf.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple white wall behind a plush white leather sofa, creating a clean and bright interview setting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Question -> Response/Story -> Visual Evidence (Photos) -> Sentiment
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a heartfelt tribute for Mother's Day, where the creator 'Er Bo' interviews her mother and shares personal memories. It aims to evoke empathy and nostalgia among the audience, humanizing the influencer and encouraging viewers to appreciate their own mothers through emotional storytelling and family history.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific product is promoted; the focus is entirely on the personal narrative and holiday theme.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of polka-dot patterns and reference to 'Er Bo' (a known personality in the Taiwanese YouTube sphere).
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a high amount of text overlays and subtitle effects common in variety-style vlogs to maintain viewer engagement during long dialogue sequences.
